title: What real brotherhood actually costs
caption:
You have followers. You don't have brothers.

A real brother has access you don't give anyone else — not just your wins, but your actual life. The thing you're ashamed of. The decision you already regret. A man who only gets your highlight reel is an acquaintance.

Brotherhood costs something: the first honest admission. You drop the performance. You say the real thing. And every real friendship started with one man deciding to go first.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16. Not a stage. Not a small group icebreaker. One man, this week. The healing starts on the other side of the first hard sentence.

Save this and send it to the brother who doesn't know what you're actually carrying right now.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #accountability #godlymen #manofgod #discipleship #james516 #confess
